# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- name: staging-postgres
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-1-3840
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: open-access
          value: 0.0.0.0/0
      activationPolicy: ALWAYS
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
- name: staging-postgres-set-password
  action: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:sql.users.update
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.staging-postgres.name)
    name: postgres
    host: "%"
    password: CloudSQL2024!
